Initializes a new instance of the ProductsController class. public ProductsController(AppDbContext context) Parameters context AppDbContext The database context. Methods Create() Displays the product creation form. public IActionResult Create() Returns IActionResult A view for creating a new product. Create(Product) Handles the submission of the product creation form. [HttpPost] [ValidateAntiForgeryToken] public Task<IActionResult> Create(Product product) Parameters product Product The product to create. Returns Task<IActionResult> A redirect to the product list view if successful; otherwise, the creation view. Delete(int?) Displays the product deletion confirmation view. public Task<IActionResult> Delete(int? id) Parameters id int? The ID of the product to delete. Returns Task<IActionResult> A view for confirming the deletion of the product. DeleteConfirmed(int) Handles the confirmation of product deletion. [HttpPost] [ActionName("Delete")] [ValidateAntiForgeryToken] public Task<IActionResult> DeleteConfirmed(int id) Parameters id int The ID of the product to delete. Returns Task<IActionResult> A redirect to the product list view. Details(int?) Displays details of a specific product. public Task<IActionResult> Details(int? id) Parameters id int? The ID of the product. Returns Task<IActionResult> A view containing the product details. Edit(int, Product) Handles the submission of the product editing form. [HttpPost] [ValidateAntiForgeryToken] public Task<IActionResult> Edit(int id, Product product) Parameters id int The ID of the product to edit. product Product The updated product details. Returns Task<IActionResult> A redirect to the product list view if successful; otherwise, the editing view. Edit(int?) Displays the product editing form. public Task<IActionResult> Edit(int? id) Parameters id int? The ID of the product to edit. Returns Task<IActionResult> A view for editing the product. Index() Displays a list of all products. public Task<IActionResult> Index() Returns Task<IActionResult> A view containing the list of products.

Methods BuildTargetModel(ModelBuilder) Implemented to build the TargetModel. protected override void BuildTargetModel(ModelBuilder modelBuilder) Parameters modelBuilder ModelBuilder The ModelBuilder to use to build the model. Remarks See Database migrations for more information and examples. Down(MigrationBuilder) Builds the operations that will migrate the database 'down'. protected override void Down(MigrationBuilder migrationBuilder) Parameters migrationBuilder MigrationBuilder The MigrationBuilder that will build the operations. Remarks That is, builds the operations that will take the database from the state left in by this migration so that it returns to the state that it was in before this migration was applied. This method must be overridden in each class that inherits from Migration if both 'up' and 'down' migrations are to be supported. If it is not overridden, then calling it will throw and it will not be possible to migrate in the 'down' direction. See Database migrations for more information and examples. Up(MigrationBuilder) Builds the operations that will migrate the database 'up'. protected override void Up(MigrationBuilder migrationBuilder) Parameters migrationBuilder MigrationBuilder The MigrationBuilder that will build the operations. Remarks That is, builds the operations that will take the database from the state left in by the previous migration so that it is up-to-date with regard to this migration. This method must be overridden in each class that inherits from Migration. See Database migrations for more information and examples.
